runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing on the full 200k-draw redundant-pipeline command (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro redundant-pipeline contract. This 200k-draw variant replaces the weaker repeated 2k-draw lane for governed Apple Metal compare evidence.
workload.description: Apples-to-apples macro render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw across a 200k-draw command stream.
workload.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings macro (200k draws)
